text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Heya-hey, Trainer! Wanna try something like a
part-time job?
choice_data_list: Like a part-time job?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The manager of the ramen shop I work at is
running a survey to improve customer
satisfaction.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My manager said the more feedback we get, the
better, so I got tasked with bringing you along!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Or so she thinks. The truth is, we needed a
cover-up to get Ines Fujin to the ramen shop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's because... her friends and the
convenience store manager are lying in wait
there, ready to kick off her surprise party!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but if you already have plans, don't worry
about it! I was just asking in case you were free.
choice_data_list: No, I'm more than happy to come along.
No, I'm more than happy to come along.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heya-hey, Boss! It's your favorite customer, Ines—

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager, Palmer, & Helios
text_block_list.text: Seat for one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wait, what are you all doing? And you're in
on it too, Boss?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And you messed up the numbers! Trainer's here
too, so you should have said "two—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh, when did you get changed, Trainer?!
choice_data_list: Please take a seat.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wha? What's this all about?!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
I now present to you your first dish. This highly
nutritious salad was curated in part by yours truly.
Don't worry, I'll send you the recipe later.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wow, it looks so cute and delicious! I think
even my sisters would eat this...

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Next up... We have some sashimi for you. This dish has been approved by one of our veteran part-timers! You're going to love it, Fu.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It looks amazing! And it's low on fat while
still being filling!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And here's your drink delivery... An energizing juice for all your flyer-distributing needs!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Um... the manager said they can't make it today
'cause of work, but they wanted you to enjoy this
in-development sports drink!
choice_data_list: And then, for dessert...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
The name of this dish is "Running Fam!" 'Cause
we're down to run with you whenever and
wherever! ☆

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Amazing! I have no notes! But...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I am extremely confused right now!
choice_data_list: Well, that's understandable.
Well, that's understandable.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Okay. The truth is, I lied about the customer
satisfaction survey.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: R-really?! So what's going on here?
choice_data_list:
This is an expression of gratitude from your
managers.

This is an expression of gratitude from your
managers.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Grati...tude?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Fu, thanks for all you do. Your cheerful attitude
towards work has been such a boon to this place.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Your cheerfulness and proactive work ethic have
been a help so many times.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
And that's why we wanted to repay you for
everything you've done.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You guys... I should be the one repaying the favor here!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But still, I want to make the most of your kind
gesture!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Time to savor every last crumb of this goodwill
gourmet course!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Mmf... Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Mmm!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! What a meal! The food was so
delicious—mild and sweet, just how I like it!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Glad to hear it! So, what did you think? I hope
you enjoyed it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
This one's a no-brainer! A gesture like this,
arranged by all the people I love...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: As if it could be anything but amazing!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: What a relief!
choice_data_list: Looks like we hit it out of the park!
Looks like we hit it out of the park!
Sorry for keeping this all a secret!
Sorry for keeping this all a secret!
I'm starting to see why you feel the way you do.
I'm starting to see why you feel the way you do.

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: What a relief!
choice_data_list: Looks like we hit it out of the park!
Looks like we hit it out of the park!
Sorry for keeping this all a secret!
Sorry for keeping this all a secret!
I'm starting to see why you feel the way you do.
I'm starting to see why you feel the way you do.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Man, that was one impressive
surprise—annoyingly so! You really got me good.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...But surprises really are awesome! I want to get
another one sometime.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Which means I've got to keep doing my
best—with my races, work, everything! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smiles spread across everyone's faces, and our
show of gratitude for Ines Fujin ends up an
enormous success.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not even mad... Wait, did you want me to
be?
choice_data_list: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I mean, you did fib to me. Okay, as punishment...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm signing you all up for a goodwill gesture from me next time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all join in with the lighthearted banter, and
our show of gratitude for Ines Fujin ends up a
success.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: The way I feel? What does that mean?
choice_data_list: Why you feel happy making people happy.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Oh, really?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come to understand exactly how Ines Fujin feels,
and our show of gratitude for her ends up a
success.
